description: A plain candid color photograph (no design overlay or on-image text) taken at a USCIS naturalization/citizenship ceremony. A smiling young man with curly dark hair, wearing a black graduation gown over a white shirt and dark tie, stands holding a small handheld American flag in one hand and a folded paper/certificate in the other. To his right is a draped blue ceremonial flag (likely a state or government flag with a seal) on a wooden pole, and behind him is an indoor office/ceremony room with neutral walls and carpet. This is a routine event snapshot documenting a new citizen (the tweet identifies him as 'Fahed,' who became a citizen and graduated high school the same day) and is not a designed graphic or meme.
